query_name: CPSクーポン_対象リスト作成
query_string:
select
  shop_no
  , shop_name
  , case when pref_name in ('佐賀県', '宮崎県', '熊本県', '長崎県', '鹿児島県') then '非対象' else '対象' end as segment
  , '2025-12-01' as before_from
  , '2025-12-14' as before_to
  , '2026-01-05' as after_from
  , '2026-01-31' as after_to
from
  mst_shop
where
  status = '02'
order by
  1,2
